changeSet.author: kai
changeSet.comment: Create table for user behavior event tracking
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_lifecycle ( user_id String, event_type Enum8('REGISTER' = 1, 'LOGIN' = 2, 'CARD_ADDED' = 3, 'DELETE' = 4), ip_address IPv4, user_agent String, event_time DateTime64(3, 'UTC') ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (event_time, user_id);
